activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of the Happy Prince
activities_projects.objective: Understand the personality and values of the Happy Prince
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Identify the actions of the Happy Prince
Write 4–5 sentences explaining his character

activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of the Swallow
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of the swallow in the story
steps: Identify the swallow’s actions in the story
Explain why the swallow decides to help the prince
Write 4–5 sentences describing the swallow’s character

activities_projects.title: Problems of the Poor
activities_projects.objective: Identify social issues described in the story
steps: Find examples of poor people mentioned in the story
Write their problems in 3–4 sentences

activities_projects.title: Symbolism of the Jewels
activities_projects.objective: Understand the meaning behind the ruby and sapphires
steps: Identify who receives the ruby and sapphires
Explain why the prince gives them away

activities_projects.title: Events Leading to the Swallow’s Death
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sacrifice made by the swallow
steps: Read the ending of the story
Write the sequence of events leading to the swallow’s death

activities_projects.title: City Life in the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the conditions of the city described
steps: Identify how rich and poor people live in the city
Write 4–5 sentences describing the contrast

activities_projects.title: Importance of Compassion
steps: Identify acts of kindness in the story
Explain why compassion is important

activities_projects.title: Title Justification
activities_projects.objective: Explain why the story is called 'The Happy Prince'
steps: Think about the prince’s life and actions
Write 3–4 sentences explaining the title

activities_projects.title: Message of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the central message of the story
steps: Think about what the story teaches readers
Write the message in your own words

activities_projects.title: Short Summary Writing
steps: Read the story again
Write a short summary in 6–8 sentences
